description: REQ-011 requires that Step 4 (updateProjections) runs after a successful write to refresh Feed sort and TagInventory. The pipeline orchestrator never invokes updateProjections. Lines 98-102 in pipeline.ts contain a comment acknowledging Step 4 but no actual call. This means Feed.refreshSort and TagInventory.applyDelta are never executed, and TagInventoryUpdated events (REQ-012) are never emitted from the pipeline.
